parameters.query:
SELECT
    id,
    house_id,
    edge_id,
    type_id,
    mode,
    name,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(device_states, '$.zp.mode')) AS mode,
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(device_states, '$.zp.fan_speed')) AS fan_speed
FROM rooms
WHERE edge_id = {{ $json.edge_id }}
ORDER BY id ASC;

parameters.content: ## 用 SQL 取出目前的風速
## step 4.  把現在的風速 記錄到 Sheet

## 1. 廚房 中控 7  Sheet : https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19uNRFYe5_4zn_qooGuf81gvGgCm-yRV3QVAJBiCpuTk/edit?gid=1489727203#gid=1489727203

## 2. Step-1 工作流 : https://chenghyang2001.app.n8n.cloud/workflow/VDN9n1CLatj9riFw
